msg: Sprint 9 & 10 Planning: ML Predictions + Custom Query Builder - Sprint 9 (Nov 6-13): Neural network game predictions using 950+ games, 3 hidden layers, 70 features. Aligns with Dr. Foster's ML curriculum. - Sprint 10 (Nov 14-20): Custom Query Builder implementation with stat selection, filtering, CSV export. - Updated CURRENT_STATUS.md with both sprints

Sprint 9 Data Enhancement - Testbed Phase Complete: Add EPA columns and validate calculations - Step 1: Added 13 EPA/advanced stat columns to schema (epa_per_play, success_rate, pass/rush EPA, WPA, CPOE, etc) - Step 2: Tested EPA calculation on 2024 sample - verified ranges correct - Step 3: Ready to load full 1999-2025 dataset (~6,500 games, 13,000 records) - Following testbed-first methodology - 5.8x more training data for ML model - EPA is THE most predictive stat (explains 80% of outcomes)

Sprint 9 Data Enhancement - COMPLETE: Historical data load successful - Fixed INSERT to include opponent, is_home, season, week fields - Fixed numpy type conversion for PostgreSQL -  Loaded 7,263 games (1999-2025, 27 seasons) -  Created 14,312 team-game records with EPA -  100% EPA coverage (14,311/14,312 records) - Avg EPA/play: -0.0188, Success rate: 43.6% - Total time: 4min 23sec (schedules + play-by-play + calculations) - Ready for neural network training with 6.4x more data!
label: 7,263 GAMES LOADED — full 1999-2025 dataset, 14,312 records, 4m 23s load

Documentation: Database architecture explained - Clarify single database with hcl (historical 1999-2025) and public (live standings) schemas - 2025 data IS in historical database and can be refreshed - Live updater vs historical loader purposes - Data flow diagrams and common scenarios
